name: Vegetable Salad with Herbal Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Sugar Snap Peas, strings pulled
1 medium Clove Garlic, peeled and minced
1 tbsp Rice or White Wine Vinegar
2 tbsp Minced Herbs (such as Dill, Tarragon, and/or Basil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Asparagus on the diagonal into 1 1/2-inch pieces.
2. Cut the Carrots on the diagonal into 1/4-inch pieces.
3. Fill a bowl with ice water. Bring a pan of water to boil. Add the Asparagus and cook for 3 minutes, starting the timer when the vegetables go into the water. Remove the vegetables with a wire or slotted spoon to the ice water. Bring the pan of water back to boil. Add the Carrots and Peas; cook for 2 minutes. Drain and plunge the vegetables into the ice water.
4. When the vegetables have cooled, drain and wrap in paper towels. Place into a plastic bag and refrigerate.
5. In a blender or small food processor combine Garlic, Dijon Mustard, Lemon Juice, and Vinegar. Slowly add the Olive Oil while blending until emulsified. Add Salt, Pepper, and Herbs. (The dressing can also be whisked together by hand.)
6. When ready to serve, combine Asparagus, Carrots, and Peas with Tomatoes. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and stir until well coated.
